basic_info.name: AEL
basic_info.description: Segmentation packaging of AEL subset LCMS with pixel-level crack masks for top-down pavement imagery.
basic_info.family_description: AEL is a French top-down pavement crack dataset family composed of multiple subsets such as AIGLE_RN, ESAR, and LCMS.

project_context.family_description: AEL is a French top-down pavement crack dataset family composed of multiple subsets such as AIGLE_RN, ESAR, and LCMS.

annotation_schema.description: Binary crack masks paired with AEL LCMS images

quality_assurance.annotation_quality: Pixel-level masks provided in AEL database release

authors.name: Sylvie Chambon
authors.affiliation: Institut de Recherche en Informatique de Toulouse (IRIT)

license: Not explicitly stated in source page

source_publication.article_title: Automatic Crack Detection on Two-Dimensional Pavement Images: An Algorithm Based on Minimal Path Selection
source_publication.journal: IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems
